name: Arch
description: The first archaerhodopsin-based voltage indicator, establishing that microbial opsins can optically report membrane potential, though with extremely dim baseline fluorescence.

kinetics.note: Sub-millisecond single time constant; on/off not separately resolved at this resolution. Paper reports <1 ms response.

brightnessData.note: Computed from EC=48900 M⁻¹cm⁻¹ at 559 nm × QY≈1.1×10⁻⁴ (Herasymenko 2025). Reference EGFP EC×QY=20040.
